package rulecoverage

import (
    "bufio"
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "os"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for gzip_reader_writer_recreated_per_item: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: gzip.NewReader(...) or gzip.NewWriter(...) recreated inside iterative paths instead of per stream.
type CaseGzipReaderWriterRecreatedPerItemDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGzipReaderWriterRecreatedPerItemModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGzipReaderWriterRecreatedPerItemRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGzipReaderWriterRecreatedPerItemModel
}

type CaseGzipReaderWriterRecreatedPerItemService struct {
    repo *CaseGzipReaderWriterRecreatedPerItemRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGzipReaderWriterRecreatedPerItemAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeGzipReaderWriterRecreatedPerItem(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGzipReaderWriterRecreatedPerItemDTO) error {
    focus := "gzip_reader_writer_recreated_per"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    normalized := strings.ToLower(input)
    for _, item := range items { _ = normalized; _ = item.ID }
    file, _ := os.Open(input)
    reader := bufio.NewReader(file)
    _ = reader
    gzip_reader_writer_recreated_per_negative := map[string]int{"gzip": 1, "reader": 2, "writer": 3, "recreated": 4, "per": 5, "item": 6}
    gzip_reader_writer_recreated_per_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    gzip_negative_0 := gzip_reader_writer_recreated_per_negative["gzip"] + len(input)
    _ = gzip_negative_0
    reader_negative_1 := gzip_reader_writer_recreated_per_negative["reader"] + len(input)
    _ = reader_negative_1
    writer_negative_2 := gzip_reader_writer_recreated_per_negative["writer"] + len(input)
    _ = writer_negative_2
    recreated_negative_3 := gzip_reader_writer_recreated_per_negative["recreated"] + len(input)
    _ = recreated_negative_3
    for per_negative_4Index, item := range items { gzip_reader_writer_recreated_per_negative[item.ID] = per_negative_4Index }
    for item_negative_5Index, item := range items { gzip_reader_writer_recreated_per_negative[item.ID] = item_negative_5Index }
    return nil
}
